name: Anu the Exarch of Heaven
rules_text:
Apocalyptic Initiative (13)
🛡️ Guard 7 • ⚔️ First Strike 7
Acts before all others. Attacks strike all foes simultaneously. Reduces enemy morale by 1 permanently.
Ruler of the Specular Crown. Anu embodies divine entropy; his attacks reduce enemy initiative by half and permanently lower morale of defeated foes.
When attacking, this unit strikes all opponents simultaneously. Damage dealt ignores guard and cannot be countered. Enemies that fall before him lose 1 morale permanently.

name: Boundary Fine
rules_text: Choose a player who crossed your Line this turn. They lose 1 Oath or you gain 1 Temper on a Relic.
lore_text: The cheapest law is still a law.

name: Censor Audit
rules_text: Target a player with Audit Heat ≥ 3. They must either discard a Name or place Silence on a unit.
lore_text: The court's favorite answer when nuance becomes inconvenient.

name: Condemnation Seal
rules_text: Choose a Downed unit. It cannot be saved or readied this round.
lore_text: A scarlet stamp final enough to feel religious.

name: Convoy Priority
rules_text: Ready one exhausted unit. It cannot support this round.
lore_text: Some cargo outranks sleep.

name: Dust Court Recess
rules_text: End one Engagement immediately. Both units gain Stagger.
lore_text: Even Mars pauses when the record gets messy.

name: Emergency Rationing
rules_text: Until your next turn, Oath Upkeep costs 1 less for all your cards.
lore_text: No one likes it until the granary burns.

name: Festival Truce
rules_text: Choose two players. Until your next turn, they cannot declare Engagements against each other. Lower both players' Heat by 1.
lore_text: Drums can postpone blood better than diplomats.

name: Forced Testimony
rules_text: Expose a Hidden Line or set card, then draw 1.
lore_text: Truth arrives faster when escorted.

name: Mercy Docket
rules_text: Clear Silence and one Wound from a friendly Character.
lore_text: Filed by the rare clerk who still remembers faces.

name: Night Market Clause
rules_text: Play during End step. Draw 2, then discard 1 and raise Heat by 1.
lore_text: Every forbidden market has better paperwork than the legal one.

name: Public Reckoning
rules_text: Each opponent with Heat 4 or more chooses: discard a card, exhaust a unit, or lose 2 Oath.
lore_text: Read aloud where everyone can hear the shame.

name: River Evacuation
rules_text: Displace up to two units from the same Field.
lore_text: Sirens first, arguments later.

name: Royal Pardon
rules_text: Remove all Cracks from one friendly Boss or Name; lower your Heat by 2.
lore_text: The kind of forgiveness only power can afford.

name: Sun-Script Overload
rules_text: Deal 1 Wound to all units inside a Warfield.
lore_text: Too much decree turns daylight into artillery.

name: Writ of Seizure
rules_text: Exhaust target Relic or Site until its controller's next Upkeep.
lore_text: Stamped with the urgency of men who arrive armed.

name: Anzu, Storm-Thief
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. When you win a Wind Test, Steal Charge and raise opponent's Audit Heat +1.
lore_text: Its shadow arrives before the weather admits defeat.

name: Archive Seraph
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Once per round, copy one friendly Name, Site, or Relic text until end of turn.
lore_text: A many-eyed executor of precedent older than mercy.

name: Basalt Ferryman
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. After a friendly Displace, you may move the same unit into another friendly Field.
lore_text: Not every ferryman serves the living.

name: Bull of Heaven Fragment
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Friendly Stone Tests gain +1; after you win one, Displace the loser.
lore_text: A ruin-sized memory of divine force.

name: Copper Storm Choir
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Friendly Edicts cost 1 less this round and next.
lore_text: The song arrives as weather and leaves as statute.

name: Fish-Apkallu Echo
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Once each turn, clear Silence from a friendly unit or Name.
lore_text: It rises from water already remembering the solution.

name: Lamassu, Gate-Guardian
rules_text: Invoke Oath 2 + Sigil 2 (2 Rounds). Once per round, cancel Displace or Steal Charge against your units. Your Sanctuary Field gains Hidden Line.
lore_text: A winged verdict with the patience of stone.

name: Lion of the Threshold
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Enemies crossing your Line lose 1 Oath.
lore_text: No door likes to be tested after this one appears.

name: Moon Barge Apparition
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Once per round, move one friendly unit between Fields without triggering Geas.
lore_text: A ferry made from reflected tides and overdue prayers.

name: Mushussu, Ember Coil
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Once per round, deal 1 Wound to a unit that crossed your Line.
lore_text: Dragons in this court are legal precedent with teeth.

name: Namtar Shade
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. When an enemy Falls Silent, you may draw 1.
lore_text: Plague's clerk still knows where all the names are filed.

name: Scorpion Judge
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. After you win an Oath or Eye Test, place Bind on a Downed unit without extra cost.
lore_text: Its claws argue more persuasively than most tribunals.

name: Seven Wind Herald
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. The first friendly Wind or Eye Test each round gains +2.
lore_text: Its wings make maps out of panic.

name: Solar Juror
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Once per round, win ties on Oath or Eye Tests.
lore_text: Its halo is less light than decision made visible.

name: Tablet Wraith Host
rules_text: Invoke for 2 rounds. Enemy Names gain +1 Swap Risk while this is active.
lore_text: It feeds on revised clauses and rushed signatures.

name: Broken Oath
rules_text: When any player fails Oath Upkeep, that player also gains 1 Audit Heat.
lore_text: Its text appears only after trust is spent.

name: Closed Gate
rules_text: Inside Sanctuary Fields, Wound cannot be chosen as a Consequence.
lore_text: A city can outlaw blood for one holy hour.

name: Far Ear
rules_text: Players may look at the top card of their deck once each turn.
lore_text: The walls begin reporting long before witnesses arrive.

name: Glass Mercy
rules_text: The first Silence placed each round becomes Stagger instead.
lore_text: It cuts kinder than iron, and leaves cleaner regret.

name: Hearth Amnesty
rules_text: The first time each player would gain Audit Heat each round, reduce it by 1.
lore_text: Peace is still a rule when properly written.

name: Heavy Crowns
rules_text: Bosses and Heroes gain +1 Stone, but cannot be supported.
lore_text: A rule loved by tyrants until it isolates them.

name: Open Ledger
rules_text: Each player may Lower Heat by discarding one extra card at End.
lore_text: Mercy, filed in duplicate.

name: Quiet Graves
rules_text: Abilities can’t be used outside Engagements. Veil Tests gain +1. Swap Risk: +1 Audit Heat.
lore_text: Where this law stands, noise loses jurisdiction.

name: Red Distance
rules_text: Displace gains +1 strength and may cross one extra Line.
lore_text: Mars wrote this law with wind and attrition.

name: Salt Covenant
rules_text: Crossing a Line requires pay 1 Oath or take Silence until end of turn.
lore_text: The old marsh law every smuggler curses.

name: Swift Shadow
rules_text: The first Veil or Wind Test each turn gains +1.
lore_text: Couriers invoke it when a city forgets how to blink.

name: Two Suns
rules_text: Sites produce one extra benefit when first used each round.
lore_text: Processions stretch longer when both shadows obey.

name: Void Appeal
rules_text: Once each turn, when an enemy wins an Arbitration, cancel that result unless they pay 2 extra Oath.
lore_text: Some courts still hear petitions from the dark between stars.

name: Weight of Kingship
rules_text: Bosses cost 1 less to play, but gain +1 Crack whenever they Fall Silent.
lore_text: Power comes easier than stability.

name: Witness Noon
rules_text: Hidden Lines cannot stay hidden. Eye Tests gain +1.
lore_text: At noon, even the evasions cast evidence.

name: Bitumen Tortoise
rules_text: Slow Shelter: Host gains +1 Armor-equivalent on Stone or Oath Tests; crossing a Line no longer staggers it.
lore_text: A patient shell-beast used by survey caravans.

name: Dust Mite
rules_text: Burrow Hitch: Host gains +1 to Stone Tests while inside your Field.
lore_text: A furnace-tolerant scavenger that curls under greaves and boundary stones.

name: Gate Viper
rules_text: Threshold Fang: Host gains +1 to Eye and Veil Tests; when an enemy crosses your Line, Host may Bind if that enemy is Downed.
lore_text: Temple keepers say it tastes fear through stone.

name: Grave Moth
rules_text: Quiet Wing: Host gains +1 to Veil Tests; if Host Silences a unit, lower your Audit Heat by 1.
lore_text: Drawn to grave-law, ash, and unspoken names.

name: Halo Pup
rules_text: Radiant Guard: Once per round, cancel Displace against Host.
lore_text: A ceremonial ward-beast bred for procession lines.

name: Ink Crow
rules_text: Black Trace: After Host wins a Veil or Eye Test, place Stagger on the loser.
lore_text: Its feathers drink moonlight and spit it back as omen-lines.

name: Lantern Gecko
rules_text: Glowclimb: Host ignores the first Silence placed on it each round.
lore_text: Its belly-lamps pulse when a decree or ward is near.

name: Oath Beetle
rules_text: Seal Cling: When Host would cross a Line, you may pay 1 Oath to ignore the Geas.
lore_text: A chitin charm more loyal to law than to flesh.

name: Pearl Kite
rules_text: Updraft Escort: Host gains +1 to Wind and Eye Tests during Raids.
lore_text: A bright river glider trained to spot weak lines in a defense.

name: Quarry Jackal Pup
rules_text: Pack Feint: If Host has an adjacent ally, Host gains +1 to Wind Tests.
lore_text: Young runners learn convoy discipline before they ever bare fangs.

name: Reed Cat
rules_text: Trackrunner: Host gains +1 to Wind Tests; if you win, you may Displace.
lore_text: Canal-bred companion prized for balance, speed, and sudden line breaks.

name: River Lynx
rules_text: Wake Hunter: If Host Displaces a unit, that unit also loses 1 Temper if able.
lore_text: Half myth, half barge rumor, all claws at dusk.

name: Seal Hound
rules_text: Witness Sniff: Once each turn, after Host wins an Eye Test, expose one Hidden Line or set card.
lore_text: Bred to follow wax, oil, and oath-scent through packed streets.

name: Shard Bat
rules_text: Echo Rush: Host gains +1 to the first Veil or Wind Test each turn.
lore_text: Its wing-clicks map canyons and hidden thresholds alike.

name: Tablet Finch
rules_text: Margin Pecker: After Host wins an Oath Test, scry the top card of any deck.
lore_text: A court scribe's nuisance and a notary's lucky omen.

name: Archive Prism
rules_text: Once per round, copy the triggered text of a friendly Name, Edict, or Site you control.
lore_text: Every face holds a different precedent.

name: Ashen Hourglass
rules_text: Once per turn, after any Test, exhaust this Relic to reduce or increase one total by 1.
lore_text: Every grain is a burnt appeal.

name: Bitumen Harness
rules_text: Bearer gains +1 to Stone Tests while attacking.
lore_text: Convoy crews strap these on before the first dune howl.

name: Gravity Lance
rules_text: Temper (3). During a Stone Test, spend Temper: +1 per charge. If you win, also Displace.
lore_text: A spear-engine that tugs the world sideways for a blink.

name: Kudurru Nail
rules_text: Attach to a Field or Character. Enemies crossing that Line take Stagger.
lore_text: A boundary spike hammered in with legal malice.

name: Ledger Rewrite
rules_text: Once per turn, redo a Test modifier; if you do, raise your Audit Heat +1.
lore_text: Its ivory leaves remember the version of truth you almost had.

name: Mirror Hook
rules_text: After Bearer wins a Wind Test, you may steal 1 Temper from an enemy Relic.
lore_text: A polished barb that catches more than cloth.

name: Null Cantor
rules_text: When you win an Eye Test, target loses abilities until end of next turn.
lore_text: A bronze throat lattice that sings gaps into hostile law.

name: Reedglass Lens
rules_text: Look at the top card of any deck at start of your turn; Bearer gains +1 Eye for that turn if you leave it there.
lore_text: River artisans mount these in lacquer and prayer.

name: Sealbreaker Awl
rules_text: Bearer gains +1 to Eye Tests against Bosses and Names.
lore_text: Tool of clerks who moonlight as saboteurs.

name: Shardwheel Engine
rules_text: Temper (2). Spend 1 Temper: Bearer may support without gaining Heat once this round.
lore_text: Portable momentum built for bad terrain and worse intent.

name: Sirocco Bracer
rules_text: Bearer gains +1 to Wind Tests; if it Displaces, lower your Heat by 1 once per round.
lore_text: Red dust hums under its engraved bands.

name: Sunscript Censer
rules_text: At End step, you may pay 1 Oath to clear Silence from Bearer or an allied unit in the same Field.
lore_text: The smoke curls into clauses before it fades.

name: Trial Chain
rules_text: When Bearer engages a Boss, add one extra Trial counter the first time it wins each match.
lore_text: An oath-forged loop heavy enough to convince a god.

name: Witness Bell
rules_text: When Bearer wins an Oath or Eye Test, expose one set or hidden effect.
lore_text: Its note makes lies feel heavy.

name: Basalt Quay
rules_text: Zone: Wilds. Units entering may immediately Displace 1.
lore_text: Low-g smugglers and river raiders both love an honest edge.

name: Bitumen Furnace
rules_text: Zone: Warfield. Friendly Stone Tests gain +1 while attacking.
lore_text: Heat and labor make their own religion here.

name: Clause Pike
rules_text: Zone: Threshold. After an Arbitration here, winner gains 1 Temper on a Relic or draws 1.
lore_text: Survey law written into the road itself.

name: Destiny Archive Vault
rules_text: Zone: Sanctuary. Once per round, copy the triggered text of one friendly Name, Edict, or Relic in this Field.
lore_text: The shelves remember outcomes even when history does not.

name: Dust Gate
rules_text: Zone: Threshold. The first enemy to enter each round loses 1 Oath.
lore_text: The tollkeepers are gone; the toll remains.

name: Halo Terrace
rules_text: Zone: Sanctuary. Friendly support actions from this Field do not add Heat.
lore_text: A ceremonial balcony built to make discipline look effortless.

name: Mirror Archive
rules_text: Zone: Sanctuary. Once each turn, controller may look at the top card of any deck.
lore_text: Its walls file reflections as evidence.

name: Oath Chain Dais
rules_text: Zone: Sanctuary. Bound units here cost 1 less Oath to capture.
lore_text: Built for sentences that need architecture.

name: Reed Lock
rules_text: Zone: Wilds. Friendly units here gain +1 Wind Tests.
lore_text: A wet geometry that favors locals and fools.

name: Sanctuary Court
rules_text: Zone: Sanctuary. Inside this Field, Consequence choices are limited to Silence or Bind; Wound cannot be chosen.
lore_text: A legal refuge until someone rewrites what refuge means.

name: Shard Plateau Blind
rules_text: Zone: Wilds. Friendly Veil and Eye Tests gain +1 during the first Engagement each round.
lore_text: From up here, everything else feels admitted too early.

name: Star Bell Harbor
rules_text: Zone: Wilds. Once per round, cancel one Displace or Steal Charge against a friendly unit here.
lore_text: The harbor bells ring before the danger actually arrives.

name: Threshold Stair
rules_text: Zone: Threshold. Units crossing this Line take Stagger unless they pay 1 Oath.
lore_text: Every step remembers who had permission.

name: Warfield Basin
rules_text: Zone: Warfield. Raid victories here grant +1 additional Mark once per turn.
lore_text: Old floodworks make excellent siege geometry.

name: Witness Square
rules_text: Zone: Threshold. Hidden Lines do not function here.
lore_text: A plaza where secrets go to become testimony.
